languages.original_text: "An inquisitive mind is a rare thing in a layperson. And a layperson who dares to apply their mind to the mysteries of xenos and retains their vital functions is a statistical miracle. Nuncius and I invite you to a discussion for the purposes of mutual enrichment, Mistress Heydari."

languages.text: "Пытливый разум — редкое качество для мирянина. А мирянин, посмевший применить свой ум на постижение тайн ксеносов и сохранивший свои жизненные функции — статистическое чудо. Мы с Нунциусом приглашаем вас к дискуссии с целью взаимного обогащения знаниями, госпожа Хейдари".

"An inquisitive mind is a rare thing in a layperson. And a layperson who dares to apply their mind to the mysteries of xenos and retains their vital functions is a statistical miracle. Nuncius and I invite you to a discussion for the purposes of mutual enrichment, Mistress Heydari."

Nuncius and I invite you to a discussion for the purposes of mutual enrichment, Mistress Heydari."

"An inquisitive mind is a rare thing in a layperson. And a layperson who dares to apply their mind to the mysteries of xenos and retains their vital functions is a statistical miracle. Nuncius and I invite you to a discussion for the purposes of mutual enrichment, Mistress Heydari."

languages.text: «Es raro que los laicos posean una mente inquisitiva. Y que un laico que ose estudiar los misterios de los xenos y conserve sus funciones vitales es un milagro, estadísticamente hablando. Nuncius y yo la invitamos a un debate con el propósito del enriquecimiento mutuo, señora Heydari».
languages.original_text: "An inquisitive mind is a rare thing in a layperson. And a layperson who dares to apply their mind to the mysteries of xenos and retains their vital functions is a statistical miracle. Nuncius and I invite you to a discussion for the purposes of mutual enrichment, Mistress Heydari."

traits.locale_text: «Es raro que los laicos posean una mente inquisitiva. Y que un laico que ose estudiar los misterios de los xenos y conserve sus funciones vitales es un milagro, estadísticamente hablando. Nuncius y yo la invitamos a un debate con el propósito del enriquecimiento mutuo, señora Heydari».

languages.text: 「探究心に富む知性は、世俗の者には稀なものです。そして、異種族の秘儀に自らの知性を向けようと敢えてし、なおかつ生命機能を保っている世俗の者は、統計的奇跡と言えます。ヌンキウスと私は、相互の知的充実を目的とした議論に、あなたをお招きします、ヘイダリ女史」
languages.original_text: "An inquisitive mind is a rare thing in a layperson. And a layperson who dares to apply their mind to the mysteries of xenos and retains their vital functions is a statistical miracle. Nuncius and I invite you to a discussion for the purposes of mutual enrichment, Mistress Heydari."

traits.locale_text: 「探究心に富む知性は、世俗の者には稀なものです。そして、異種族の秘儀に自らの知性を向けようと敢えてし、なおかつ生命機能を保っている世俗の者は、統計的奇跡と言えます。ヌンキウスと私は、相互の知的充実を目的とした議論に、あなたをお招きします、ヘイダリ女史」

languages.text: “拥有求知欲的教外人士本就罕见，而一个敢于探究异形奥秘、还能保留生命机能的教外人士，更是统计学意义上的奇迹。努恩修斯和我诚邀你参加一场有益共同进步的学术讨论，海达利女士。”
languages.original_text: "An inquisitive mind is a rare thing in a layperson. And a layperson who dares to apply their mind to the mysteries of xenos and retains their vital functions is a statistical miracle. Nuncius and I invite you to a discussion for the purposes of mutual enrichment, Mistress Heydari."

traits.locale_text: “拥有求知欲的教外人士本就罕见，而一个敢于探究异形奥秘、还能保留生命机能的教外人士，更是统计学意义上的奇迹。努恩修斯和我诚邀你参加一场有益共同进步的学术讨论，海达利女士。”

languages.text: "Ein wissbegieriger Verstand findet sich bei Laien nur selten. Und eine Laiin, der sich mit den Mysterien der Xenos befasst, ohne ihre Vitalfunktionen zu verlieren, ist ein statistisches Wunder. Nuncius und ich laden Euch zu einer Diskussion ein, die uns alle bereichern dürfte, Meisterin Heydari."
languages.original_text: "An inquisitive mind is a rare thing in a layperson. And a layperson who dares to apply their mind to the mysteries of xenos and retains their vital functions is a statistical miracle. Nuncius and I invite you to a discussion for the purposes of mutual enrichment, Mistress Heydari."

traits.locale_text: "Ein wissbegieriger Verstand findet sich bei Laien nur selten. Und eine Laiin, der sich mit den Mysterien der Xenos befasst, ohne ihre Vitalfunktionen zu verlieren, ist ein statistisches Wunder. Nuncius und ich laden Euch zu einer Diskussion ein, die uns alle bereichern dürfte, Meisterin Heydari."

languages.text: « La curiosité est rare chez les profanes. Et une profane qui ose s'intéresser aux mystères xénos tout en conservant ses fonctions vitales, c'est un miracle statistique. Nuncius et moi vous invitons à une discussion ayant pour objectif notre enrichissement mutuel, maîtresse Heydari. »
languages.original_text: "An inquisitive mind is a rare thing in a layperson. And a layperson who dares to apply their mind to the mysteries of xenos and retains their vital functions is a statistical miracle. Nuncius and I invite you to a discussion for the purposes of mutual enrichment, Mistress Heydari."

traits.locale_text: « La curiosité est rare chez les profanes. Et une profane qui ose s'intéresser aux mystères xénos tout en conservant ses fonctions vitales, c'est un miracle statistique. Nuncius et moi vous invitons à une discussion ayant pour objectif notre enrichissement mutuel, maîtresse Heydari. »

languages.text: "Araştırmacı bir zihin, ruhban olmayanlarda nadir rastlanan bir durumdur. Zihnini zenoların gizemlerine yormaya cüret eden ve hayati fonksiyonlarını koruyan ruhban dışı biri ise istatistiksel bir mucizedir. Nuncius ve ben, karşılıklı zenginleşme amacıyla sizi bir tartışmaya davet ediyoruz Üstat Heydari."
languages.original_text: "An inquisitive mind is a rare thing in a layperson. And a layperson who dares to apply their mind to the mysteries of xenos and retains their vital functions is a statistical miracle. Nuncius and I invite you to a discussion for the purposes of mutual enrichment, Mistress Heydari."
